description: Style NoteLook dapper in this olive coloured shirt from adidas. Cut from soft cotton fabric this piece will keep you cool and dry on a sunny day. Pair it with denims and cool sneakers to look your casual best.Product DetailsOlive green shirt, has a spread collar with knit piping, full buttoned placket with knit piping, short sleeves with with knit piping, paneled front with buttoned tab on shoulder, yoke at back, and a curved hemlineMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine wash warmDo not soak, tumble dry, bleach or dry cleanSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size M
